description:
Power On and Off WebOS LG TVs together with your PC.

This application (UI and service) controls LG WebOS TVs and displays.
New and updated:
- New feature in User Idle Mode - ignore list for keyboard keys to be excluded when determining idle state - thanks to @TimonFeldmann
- Improvements to user Idle Mode - Zen browser support - thanks to @arough007
- New CLI-commands: -streaming_connect and -streaming_disconnect. They can be used e.g. in streaming hosts command buffer to force LGTVC to identify streaming start and stop.
Bugfixes
- Sunshine / Apollo detection fixed
- Network adapter selection box auto adjust width to fit content
